name: Leaderboard
when_to_use: 需要把参与者、团队、产品或模型按一个主分数排序，并快速看出前 3 名、相对差距和名次趋势时用它，适合榜单浏览、绩效快照和轻量竞赛。若要同时比较多项能力，应改用 comparison-table；若排名变化本身跨多个周期，应改用 bump chart。
why_valuable: 普通有序列表看不出分差，也常把输入顺序误当作排名；本模板按 score 稳定降序、强调领奖台、绘制同尺度值条，并用绿/红/琥珀 pill 显示正负或持平 delta。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to rank participants, teams, products, or models by one primary score and quickly show the top three, relative gaps, and rank trends. It suits leaderboard browsing, performance snapshots, and lightweight competitions. To compare several capabilities at once, use comparison-table instead; when rank changes across multiple periods are the focus, use a bump chart.
en.why_valuable: A plain ordered list does not show score gaps and often mistakes input order for ranking. This template performs a stable descending sort by score, emphasizes the podium, draws same-scale value bars, and uses green, red, or amber pills for positive, negative, or flat delta.

data_in.note: data.items is an array of ranking records. The template sorts finite numeric score values in descending order and preserves input order for ties. name is the primary label, detail is secondary information, avatar may be emoji or short text, and delta is the rank or score change from the previous period (positive green, negative red, 0 amber). Value bars normalize against the current maximum score; scoreLabel changes only the unit label below the score.

schema.title?: string - leaderboard title; displays "Leaderboard" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string - period, season, or scoring range
schema.scoreLabel?: string - short score-unit label; displays "Score" when omitted
schema.items[].name: string - participant or object name
schema.items[].score: number - primary ranking value, sorted descending
schema.items[].delta?: number - change from the previous period; positive, negative, and zero display green, red, and amber pills respectively
schema.items[].detail?: string - team, category, or description below the name
schema.items[].avatar?: string - emoji or 1-2 character avatar fallback text

spec.note: Height grows with the number of leaderboard records. Below 680px, the value bar moves to a second row and the avatar is hidden while rank, name, score, and delta remain. Show 5-12 entries at once.

data_in.note: data.items 是排名记录数组；模板按有限数值 score 降序排列，相同分数保持原输入顺序。name 是主标签，detail 是次级信息，avatar 可用 emoji 或短文本，delta 表示相对上一周期的名次/分数变化（正数绿色、负数红色、0 琥珀色）。值条按当前最大 score 归一化；scoreLabel 仅改变分数下方单位标签。

schema.title?: string —— 榜单标题；省略时显示 “Leaderboard”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 周期、赛季或评分范围
schema.scoreLabel?: string —— 分数单位短标签；省略时显示 “Score”
schema.items[].name: string —— 参与者或对象名称
schema.items[].score: number —— 排名主值；按降序排列
schema.items[].delta?: number —— 相对上一周期变化；正/负/零分别显示绿色、红色、琥珀色 pill
schema.items[].detail?: string —— 名称下方的队伍、类别或说明
schema.items[].avatar?: string —— emoji 或 1–2 字符的头像替代文本

spec.note: 按榜单记录数增高；680px 以下将值条移到第二行并隐藏头像，仍保留排名、名称、分数和 delta。建议一次展示 5–12 条。

example._why: 六支真实感团队的分数有明显梯度，并包含上升、下降与持平三种 delta，完整展示奖牌、前 3 强调、值条和趋势 pill。

uplink: 纯 display-only 组件，无 uplink；渲染结果只在当前 shadow root 中展示，不向 AI 或宿主回传状态。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
